headline: How Norfolk Southern (NSC) Is Navigating Regulatory Review to Advance Its Transformational Rail Merger Strategy
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) is one of the Best Railroad Stocks to Invest In According to Billionaires. As of Q1 2026, 24 billionaires held the stock.
